baseline.observed: The CLI guide described required values for scan options but did not include improve --prompt after the prompt parser adopted the same fail-closed rule.
The aggregate audit result mentioned flag-like prompt rejection, but the command list did not include the improve --prompt --bogus smoke.

selected_candidate.name: Improve prompt validation doc alignment
selected_candidate.reason: Keep operator docs and aggregate evidence aligned with the latest improve --prompt parser behavior.
selected_candidate.success_metric: docs/CLI.md defines flag-like --prompt rejection and completion_audit.md lists the smoke command.

verification.command: rg -n -- "flag-like|improve --prompt|--prompt --bogus|Improve prompt value safety|explicit non-flag" docs/CLI.md autoresearch/evidence/completion_audit.md
verification.result: PASS: CLI docs and completion audit contain the updated prompt-value rule and smoke command.

safety_controls: No source, tests, or runtime hooks were changed.
Historical per-iteration evidence was not rewritten.
